name: phenolic acids
description: phenolic acids is a phenolic compound compound reported in agrimonia eupatoria and Rhynchosia pyramidalis. Available source coverage remains preliminary in this dataset.
contraindications: Generally safe when used as tea
due to tannins may cause constipation or reduce absorption of minerals
